title: French nuclear output drops 20% on unplanned outages
summary: EDF announced today that several reactors at the Cattenom and Bugey sites are offline for unplanned maintenance, removing roughly 6 GW of capacity from the French grid through next week.

title: Mild weather forecast slashes German power demand
summary: Forecasters expect unseasonably warm temperatures across northern Europe next week, reducing heating demand and pushing day-ahead prices lower across the German baseload curve.

title: EU Commission appoints new energy commissioner
summary: The European Commission today announced the appointment of a new commissioner overseeing the energy portfolio. The appointment is administrative and does not change current policy.
